---
editor: visual
---

# Slides

You may find the paper slides. Frequently updated.

<iframe src="slides.html"
        width="100%"
        height="500px"
        style="border:2px solid blue;">
</iframe>

# Paper

Here is the associated paper. Still at an early stage.

![](images/paper.pdf){width="100%"
                      height="500px"
                      style="border:2px solid blue;"}
